policy_summary: For UCLA Samueli engineering transfer admission, full Cal-GETC is optional and is not required or encouraged; partial Cal-GETC is not accepted. Applicants should prioritize lower-division major preparation. At least one arts, humanities, or social-science course is required for UC eligibility, and UCLA encourages up to four courses in those areas plus one life-science elective. If a student who began community college in Fall 2025 or later completes full Cal-GETC before transfer, it fulfills UCLA lower-division GE; otherwise the student completes the Samueli GE pattern, currently five courses and 24 quarter units minimum. Verify the applicable catalog year with UCLA and an AVC counselor.

For Cal Poly Pomona engineering, transfer students may use completed Cal-GETC toward lower-division general education. Major and campus courses approved for GE may also satisfy GE, so choose options that overlap the engineering curriculum when allowed. The exact remaining GE and graduation requirements depend on the major curriculum sheet, transfer evaluation, and catalog year; verify them with the CPP College of Engineering Advising Center and an AVC counselor.
